summary: Tested all 12 UI enhancements. 11/12 pass fully. 1 minor issue: aa-btn-ripple class is defined but only applied to EmptyState action button — not applied to OfferingCard 'View details' or ProductDetail 'Add to cart' buttons. All animations, glassmorphism, skeleton loaders, tooltips, toasts, and empty states verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: aa-btn-ripple class NOT applied to 'View details' (OfferingCard) or 'Add to cart' (ProductDetail) buttons. CSS class is defined in index.css but only used in EmptyState action button. rippleBtnCount=0 in DOM on store/product pages.

action_items: Add aa-btn-ripple class to primary action buttons: 'View details' in OfferingCard, 'Add to cart' / 'Create Order' in ProductDetail/Cart pages for the ripple effect to trigger on those buttons
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: aa-btn-ripple CSS is defined but only applied to EmptyState's action button. Should also be applied to key CTA buttons: OfferingCard's Link (or its 'View details' div), ProductDetail's add-to-cart button, Cart's Create Order button

Console warning: React hydration error '<span> cannot be a child of <tr>' in Portal's SkeletonRow — caused by development visual editor injecting data-ve-dynamic='true' span wrappers around <tr> elements inside <tbody>. Not a production issue but worth noting
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 12 UI enhancements tested. Quick reference: (1) PageLoader: thin blue progress bar at top visible during navigation ✅; (2) Page transitions: motion.div with key=location.pathname in BaseLayout+AppShell, confirmed opacity+transform animation ✅; (3) Store skeleton: SkeletonGrid in Store.tsx line 684, loads fast so barely visible ✅; (4) Articles stagger: motion.div staggerChildren:0.06 in Articles.tsx, no articles exist so EmptyState shows ✅; (5) Admin sidebar hover: 28 tabs with hover:translate-x-0.5 class ✅; (6) Admin tooltips: TooltipProvider wraps sidebar, 'Users' tooltip confirmed ✅; (7) Portal stats: 3 cards (Orders 0, Subs 0, Spend 0.00), aa-glass+aa-stat-card classes ✅; (8) Portal skeleton: SkeletonRow+SkeletonStat in loading state ✅; (9) Store empty state: EmptyState with ShoppingBag icon shows on no-results search ✅; (10) Button ripple: CSS defined but ONLY on EmptyState action btn, not on product CTA buttons ⚠️ MINOR; (11) Glassmorphism: backdropFilter blur(20px) on all 3 portal stat cards ✅; (12) Toast: borderRadius 12px, backdropFilter blur(12px), branded styling ✅

test_results.feature_1_page_loader: PASS - Blue progress bar visible at top of page during navigation, 2px height fixed div with zIndex 9999, gradient from --aa-accent to --aa-primary
test_results.feature_2_page_transitions: PASS - motion.div with key=location.pathname in BaseLayout and AppShell. Confirmed: opacity=0.999015, transform=matrix(1,0,0,1,0,0.006) (animation in progress on capture)
test_results.feature_3_store_skeleton: PASS - SkeletonGrid used in Store.tsx line 684, aa-shimmer CSS class registered and animated. Data loads fast so skeleton duration <500ms
test_results.feature_4_articles_stagger: PASS - staggerChildren:0.06 animation in Articles.tsx. No articles exist so EmptyState (BookOpen icon) shows correctly
test_results.feature_5_admin_sidebar_hover: PASS - 28 sidebar tabs all have hover:translate-x-0.5 class confirmed
test_results.feature_6_admin_sidebar_tooltips: PASS - TooltipProvider wraps sidebar, hovering Users tab shows 'Users' tooltip. 2 visible tooltip elements confirmed
test_results.feature_7_portal_stats: PASS - 3 stat cards (Orders:0, Subs:0, Spend:0.00) with aa-glass+aa-stat-card classes. useCountUp hook wired up. Values 0 as expected for platform admin
test_results.feature_8_portal_skeleton: PASS - SkeletonStat (3x) + SkeletonRow (5x) in portal-loading div. Data loads fast (<1s) making skeleton very brief
test_results.feature_9_store_empty_state: PASS - EmptyState with ShoppingBag icon renders: 'No products found' + 'No results for xyznonexistentproduct99999'. Icon+title+description all present
test_results.feature_10_button_ripple: MINOR ISSUE - CSS aa-btn-ripple defined with ::after pseudo-element. ONLY applied to EmptyState action button. NOT on OfferingCard/ProductDetail/Cart primary buttons
test_results.feature_11_glassmorphism: PASS - backdropFilter:blur(20px) confirmed on all 3 portal stat cards. backgroundColor:color(srgb 1 1 1 / 0.72) (72% opacity). aa-glass CSS class applied
test_results.feature_12_toast: PASS - Sonner toast shows 'Added to cart' with borderRadius:12px, backdropFilter:blur(12px), branded border styling. Toast visible in screenshot
